content: Solana Mobile Wallet Adapter (github solana-mobile/mobile-wallet-adapter) is current as of June 2026 — v2.2.9 released 2026-06-04. Provides JS/Android/RN PWA deep-link signing for signAndSendTransaction. Confirms BlinkEdge Phase 3 Blink+Blink execution path is feasible from a PWA without a native app wrapper.
